title: Plugin Manifest Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating a PolyClient plugin manifest file

$schema.description: Path to the schema file that validates this configuration

id.description: A globally unique identifier for the plugin. Should be lowercase and URL-safe

name.description: The human-readable name of the plugin

scope.description: Specifies the category of the plugin, which is used to identify its capabilities and dictate its loading process

version.description: The version of the plugin, following the semantic versioning spec

description.description: A short description of the plugin, which will be used to describe it in the plugin list

authors.description: A list of authors associated with the plugin

repository.description: URL of the repository where the source code of the plugin is maintained

homepage.description: URL of the plugin's homepage or documentation (optional)

keywords.description: A list of keywords related to the plugin, useful for search and discovery

entrypoint.description: The main WebAssembly (.wasm) file that serves as the entry point for the plugin

name.description: The name of the person or organization that created the plugin

websites.description: A list of URLs associated with the plugin author or organization (optional)

items.description: A website or homepage for the plugin author or organization
